name: Purchase Orders tab is visible only for Purchaseable parts
steps:
Given a part 'Resistor 10k' is marked as 'Purchaseable' and is referenced in purchase order 'PO-2026-001'
Given a user is logged in
When the user navigates to the part detail page for 'Resistor 10k' and clicks the 'Purchase Orders' tab
Then the purchase orders table displays 'PO-2026-001'
